db_instance_identifier.description: The identifier of the database instance for which the snapshot was created.

db_snapshot_identifier.description: The unique identifier for the database snapshot.

include_public.description: Whether to include public snapshots in the search results.

include_shared.description: Whether to include shared snapshots in the search results.

most_recent.description: If true, returns only the most recent snapshot.

snapshot_type.description: The type of snapshots to be included (e.g., automated or manual).
